last_result: C110 complete. DC#3 gap analysis (igt-dc3-gap-analysis.md) written — formal specification of R1 and R3 gaps using cryo-EM OA-DoF reduction trajectory as structural precedent. Three-phase cryo-EM trajectory mapped to AI interpretability: Phase 1 (high OA-DoF, expert visual) → Phase 2 (formal metric, no consensus) → Phase 3 (gold-standard metric + mandatory deposition = near-zero OA-DoF). R1 requires: reference computation (TMS analog) + formal specification language (FSC analog) + cross-tool calibration metric. R3 requires: mandatory deposition registry (wwPDB analog) + career structure for failure detection (Scholze-Stix analog). DC#3 full is achievable (~10-15 years). interpretability-grounding-si.md updated: header now shows 6 confirmed DCs; DC#6 and DC#7 added as full sections; D4 elevation pathway updated to C110. D4 streak: 101.
next_step: C111+ options: (a) wwPDB-analog architecture proposal — concrete design document for mandatory deposition + apparatus-computed validation + consortium governance in AI evaluation; (b) P1 operationalization — detailed design for circuit vs. behavioral replication experiment, specifying what constitutes cross-lab replication for circuit-level claims vs. behavioral benchmark rankings; (c) MCCF per-instantiation confidence note — IGE-MCCF eliminates independence uncertainty for physically-orthogonal instantiations, formal note needed; (d) network spine update incorporating igt-dc3-gap-analysis.md into §9 (path to D4 elevation)
